1вҶ’import AppKit
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’/// йҖЈзәҢжҚІеӢ•е…§е®№иҰ–ең–пјҲWebtoon-style vertical scrollingпјү
     4вҶ’/// дҪҝз”ЁжЁҷжә– macOS еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҲy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјүд»Ҙй…ҚеҗҲ ImageScrollView
     5вҶ’class ContinuousScrollContentView: NSView {
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’    // MARK: - Properties
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’    private var folder: ImageFolder?
    10вҶ’    private weak var imageLoader: ImageLoader?
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’    /// Configuration generation IDпјҲйҳІжӯў stale writeпјү
    13вҶ’    private var configurationID: UUID = UUID()
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’    /// й җијүзҡ„ең–зүҮе°әеҜё
    16вҶ’    private(set) var imageSizes: [NSSize] = []
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’    /// зё®ж”ҫеҫҢзҡ„й«ҳеәҰпјҲcache йҒҝе…ҚйҮҚиӨҮиЁҲз®—пјү
    19вҶ’    internal var scaledHeights: [CGFloat] = []
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’    /// жҜҸејөең–зүҮзҡ„ Y еә§жЁҷиө·е§Ӣй»һпјҲеҫһеә•йғЁй–Ӣе§ӢзҙҜз©Қпјү
    22вҶ’    private var yOffsets: [CGFloat] = []
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’    /// е®№еҷЁеҜ¬еәҰпјҲз”Ёж–ј fit-to-width иЁҲз®—пјү
    25вҶ’    var containerWidth: CGFloat = 800 {
    26вҶ’        didSet {
    27вҶ’            guard oldValue != containerWidth else { return }
    28вҶ’            recalculateLayout()
    29вҶ’            // жӣҙж–°зҸҫжңү activeSlots зҡ„ frame
    30вҶ’            for slot in activeSlots {
    31вҶ’                slot.frame = frameForImage(at: slot.imageIndex)
    32вҶ’            }
    33вҶ’        }
    34вҶ’    }
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’    /// ең–зүҮй–“и·қ
    37вҶ’    private let imageSpacing: CGFloat = 0
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’    /// й җиЁӯең–зүҮй«ҳеәҰпјҲз„Ўжі•еҸ–еҫ—е°әеҜёжҷӮдҪҝз”Ёпјү
    40вҶ’    private let defaultAspectRatio: CGFloat = 4.0 / 3.0
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’    // MARK: - Scaling Quality
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’    /// з•¶еүҚзҡ„зё®ж”ҫ filterпјҲдҫӣж–°е»ә slot еҘ—з”Ёпјү
    45вҶ’    private var currentMagFilter: CALayerContentsFilter = .linear
    46вҶ’    private var currentMinFilter: CALayerContentsFilter = .linear
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’    /// иЁӯе®ҡжүҖжңү active slots зҡ„зё®ж”ҫ filterпјҢдёҰе„Іеӯҳдҫӣж–° slot еҘ—з”Ё
    49вҶ’    func setScalingFilters(magnification: CALayerContentsFilter, minification: CALayerContentsFilter) {
    50вҶ’        guard currentMagFilter != magnification || currentMinFilter != minification else { return }
    51вҶ’        currentMagFilter = magnification
    52вҶ’        currentMinFilter = minification
    53вҶ’        for slot in activeSlots {
    54вҶ’            slot.setScalingFilters(magnification: magnification, minification: minification)
    55вҶ’        }
    56вҶ’    }
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’    // MARK: - View Recycling
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’    private var activeSlots: [ImageSlotView] = []
    61вҶ’    private var reusableSlots: [ImageSlotView] = []
    62вҶ’    private var bufferCount: Int = 2  // visible еүҚеҫҢеҗ„ buffer 2 ејө
    63вҶ’    private let defaultBufferCount: Int = 2
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’    /// Zoom йҖІиЎҢдёӯпјҡи·ійҒҺ slot еӣһж”¶пјҢеҸӘж–°еўһ slotпјҲйҳІжӯўй»‘иүІй–ғзҲҚпјү
    66вҶ’    private(set) var isZooming: Bool = false
    67вҶ’
    68вҶ’    /// й–Ӣе§Ӣ zoomпјҡжҡ«еҒң slot еӣһж”¶
    69вҶ’    func beginZoomSuppression() {
    70вҶ’        isZooming = true
    71вҶ’    }
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’    /// зөҗжқҹ zoomпјҡжҒўеҫ© slot еӣһж”¶пјҢиҷ•зҗҶе»¶йҒІзҡ„иЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣпјҢжё…зҗҶеӨҡйӨҳ slots
    74вҶ’    func endZoomSuppression(visibleBounds: NSRect) {
    75вҶ’        isZooming = false
    76вҶ’        if let level = pendingPressureLevel {
    77вҶ’            pendingPressureLevel = nil
    78вҶ’            handleMemoryPressure(level)
    79вҶ’            // handleMemoryPressure е…§йғЁе·Іе‘јеҸ« manageSlotViewsпјҢдёҚйңҖйҮҚиӨҮ
    80вҶ’        } else {
    81вҶ’            updateVisibleSlots(for: visibleBounds)
    82вҶ’        }
    83вҶ’    }
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’    // MARK: - Scroll Direction Tracking (Phase 3.2)
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’    /// дёҠж¬ЎжҚІеӢ•зҡ„ Y еә§жЁҷпјҲз”Ёж–јиЁҲз®—жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘пјү
    88вҶ’    internal var lastScrollY: CGFloat?
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’    /// жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘пјҲtrue = еҫҖдёӢжҚІеӢ•пјҢ    /// е°Ҹ y = иҰ–иҰәдёӢж–№ =        /// еӨ§ y = иҰ–иҰәдёҠж–№пјү
    91вҶ’    private(set) var isScrollingDown: Bool = true
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’    /// жңҖеҫҢе·ІзҹҘзҡ„еҸҜиҰӢеҚҖеҹҹпјҲз”Ёж–јиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣиҷ•зҗҶжҷӮеҸғиҖғпјү
    94вҶ’    private var lastKnownVisibleBounds: NSRect = .zero
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’    /// й җеҸ–зҜҖжөҒеҷЁпјҲ20Hzпјү
    97вҶ’    private var prefetchThrottle = NavigationThrottle()
    98вҶ’
    99вҶ’    // MARK: - Index Tracking
   100вҶ’
   101вҶ’    /// з•¶еүҚең–зүҮи®ҠжӣҙеӣһиӘҝпјҡ(index, scaledImageSize)
   102вҶ’    var onCurrentImageChanged: ((Int, NSSize) -> Void)?
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’    /// й җијүе®ҢжҲҗеӣһиӘҝ
   105вҶ’    var onPreloadComplete: (() -> Void)?
   106вҶ’
   107вҶ’    /// дёҠж¬ЎйҖҡзҹҘзҡ„ indexпјҲйҒҝе…ҚйҮҚиӨҮеӣһиӘҝпјү
   108вҶ’    private var lastNotifiedIndex: Int = -1
   109вҶ’
   110вҶ’    // MARK: - Configuration
   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’    /// й…ҚзҪ®иҰ–ең–
   113вҶ’    func configure(with folder: ImageFolder, imageLoader: ImageLoader) {
   114вҶ’        self.folder = folder
   115вҶ’        self.imageLoader = imageLoader
   116вҶ’        self.lastNotifiedIndex = -1
   117вҶ’        self.configurationID = UUID()  // ж–°зҡ„ configuration generation
   118вҶ’
   119вҶ’        // йҮҚзҪ®жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘
   120вҶ’        resetScrollDirection()
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’        // жё…зҗҶиҲҠзҡ„ slotsпјҲе…ҲеҸ–ж¶Ҳијүе…Ҙд»»еӢҷеҶҚз§»йҷӨпјү
   123вҶ’        for slot in activeSlots {
   124вҶ’            slot.prepareForReuse()
   125вҶ’            slot.removeFromSuperview()
   126вҶ’        }
   127вҶ’        activeSlots.removeAll()
   128вҶ’        reusableSlots.removeAll()
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’        // иЁӯе®ҡиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣзӣЈжҺ§пјҲidempotent вҖ” MemoryPressureMonitor е…§йғЁжңү guardпјү
   131вҶ’        setupMemoryPressureMonitor()
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’        NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] configure: folder.images.count=\(folder.images.count), containerWidth=\(containerWidth)")
   134вҶ’
   135вҶ’        // еңЁ Task еӨ–йғЁжҚ•зҚІжүҖжңүйңҖиҰҒзҡ„еҖјпјҢйҒҝе…ҚиіҮж–ҷз«¶зҲӯ
   136вҶ’        let capturedFolder = folder
   137вҶ’        let capturedLoader: ImageLoader? = imageLoader
   138вҶ’        let capturedConfigurationID = configurationID
   139вҶ’        let capturedDefaultRatio = defaultAspectRatio
   140вҶ’
   141вҶ’        Task { [weak self] in
   142вҶ’            guard let loader = capturedLoader else { return }
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’            // дҪҝз”Ё TaskGroup е№іиЎҢијүе…Ҙ
   145вҶ’            let sizes = await withTaskGroup(of: (Int, NSSize).self) { group in
   146вҶ’                for (index, item) in capturedFolder.images.enumerated() {
   147вҶ’                    group.addTask {
   148вҶ’                        if let size = await loader.getImageSize(for: item.url) {
   149вҶ’                            return (index, size)
   150вҶ’                        } else {
   151вҶ’                            // з„Ўжі•еҸ–еҫ—е°әеҜёжҷӮдҪҝз”Ёй җиЁӯжҜ”дҫӢ
   152вҶ’                            return (index, NSSize(width: Constants.defaultWindowWidth, height: Constants.defaultWindowWidth / capturedDefaultRatio))
   153вҶ’                        }
   154вҶ’                    }
   155вҶ’                }
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’                var results: [(Int, NSSize)] = []
   158вҶ’                for await result in group {
   159вҶ’                    results.append(result)
   160вҶ’                }
   161вҶ’                return results.sorted { $0.0 < $1.0 }.map { $0.1 }
   162вҶ’            }
   163вҶ’
   164вҶ’            await MainActor.run { [weak self] in
   165вҶ’                // Stale write йҳІиӯ·пјҡзўәиӘҚ configurationID д»Қз„¶еҢ№й…Қ
   166вҶ’                guard self?.configurationID == capturedConfigurationID else { return }
   167вҶ’                self?.imageSizes = sizes
   168вҶ’                NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] preloaded \(sizes.count) image sizes")
   169вҶ’                self?.recalculateLayout()
   170вҶ’                // йҖҡзҹҘй җијүе®ҢжҲҗ
   171вҶ’                self?.onPreloadComplete?()
   172вҶ’            }
   173вҶ’        }
   174вҶ’    }
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’    /// йҮҚзҪ®жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘пјҲз”Ёж–ј folder еҲҮжҸӣжҷӮпјү
   177вҶ’    private func resetScrollDirection() {
   178вҶ’        lastScrollY = nil
   179вҶ’        isScrollingDown = true
   180вҶ’    }
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’    /// йҮҚж–°иЁҲз®—дҪҲеұҖпјҲдҪҝз”ЁжЁҷжә–еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҡy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјү
   183вҶ’    private func recalculateLayout() {
   184вҶ’        guard !imageSizes.isEmpty else {
   185вҶ’            scaledHeights = []
   186вҶ’            yOffsets = []
   187вҶ’            frame = NSRect(x: 0, y: 0, width: containerWidth, height: 0)
   188вҶ’            NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] recalculateLayout: empty imageSizes")
   189вҶ’            return
   190вҶ’        }
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’        // Cache зё®ж”ҫеҫҢзҡ„й«ҳеәҰпјҢйҒҝе…ҚйҮҚиӨҮиЁҲз®—
   193вҶ’        scaledHeights = imageSizes.map { scaledHeightForSize($0) }
   194вҶ’        let totalHeight = scaledHeights.reduce(0, +) + CGFloat(max(0, scaledHeights.count - 1)) * imageSpacing
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’        // еҫһй Ӯз«Ҝй–Ӣе§ӢеҫҖдёӢжҺ’еҲ— (unflipped: еӨ§ y еңЁдёҠпјҢе°Ҹ y еңЁдёӢ)
   197вҶ’        var offsets: [CGFloat] = []
   198вҶ’        var currentY = totalHeight
   199вҶ’        for h in scaledHeights {
   200вҶ’            let bottomY = currentY - h
   201вҶ’            offsets.append(bottomY)
   202вҶ’            currentY = bottomY - imageSpacing
   203вҶ’        }
   204вҶ’
   205вҶ’        self.yOffsets = offsets
   206вҶ’        frame = NSRect(x: 0, y: 0, width: containerWidth, height: totalHeight)
   207вҶ’
   208вҶ’        NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] recalculateLayout: totalHeight=\(totalHeight), containerWidth=\(containerWidth), frame=\(frame)")
   209вҶ’
   210вҶ’        needsDisplay = true
   211вҶ’    }
   212вҶ’
   213вҶ’    /// иЁҲз®— fit-to-width зё®ж”ҫеҫҢзҡ„й«ҳеәҰпјҲйҳІжӯўйҷӨд»Ҙйӣ¶пјү
   214вҶ’    private func scaledHeightForSize(_ size: NSSize) -> CGFloat {
   215вҶ’        guard size.width > 0 else {
   216вҶ’            return containerWidth / defaultAspectRatio
   217вҶ’        }
   218вҶ’        return (size.height / size.width) * containerWidth
   219вҶ’    }
   220вҶ’
   221вҶ’    // MARK: - View Recycling
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’    /// жӣҙж–°еҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚе…§зҡ„ slotsпјҲе°ҚеӨ–е…ҘеҸЈпјү
   224вҶ’    func updateVisibleSlots(for visibleBounds: NSRect) {
   225вҶ’        // Cache visible boundsпјҲиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣиҷ•зҗҶжҷӮдҪҝз”Ёпјү
   226вҶ’        lastKnownVisibleBounds = visibleBounds
   227вҶ’
   228вҶ’        // жҒўеҫ© buffer countпјҲwarning еЈ“еҠӣеҫҢпјҢдёӢж¬Ў scroll жҒўеҫ©пјү
   229вҶ’        if needsBufferRestoration {
   230вҶ’            bufferCount = defaultBufferCount
   231вҶ’            needsBufferRestoration = false
   232вҶ’        }
   233вҶ’
   234вҶ’        // жӣҙж–°жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘
   235вҶ’        updateScrollDirection(currentY: visibleBounds.midY)
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’        // еҺҹжңүзҡ„ index tracking
   238вҶ’        let newIndex = calculateCurrentIndex(for: visibleBounds.midY)
   239вҶ’        if newIndex != lastNotifiedIndex {
   240вҶ’            lastNotifiedIndex = newIndex
   241вҶ’            notifyImageChanged(index: newIndex)
   242вҶ’        }
   243вҶ’
   244вҶ’        // View recycling
   245вҶ’        let visibleRange = manageSlotViews(for: visibleBounds)
   246вҶ’
   247вҶ’        // и§ёзҷјй җеҸ–
   248вҶ’        triggerPrefetch(visibleRange: visibleRange)
   249вҶ’    }
   250вҶ’
   251вҶ’    /// жӣҙж–°жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘
   252вҶ’    /// - Parameter currentY: з•¶еүҚжҚІеӢ•дҪҚзҪ®пјҲжЁҷжә–еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҢy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјү
   253вҶ’    func updateScrollDirection(currentY: CGFloat) {
   254вҶ’        if let lastY = lastScrollY {
   255вҶ’            // жЁҷжә–еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҲy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјүпјҡе°Ҹ y = иҰ–иҰәдёӢж–№ = index еўһеҠ 
   256вҶ’            isScrollingDown = currentY < lastY
   257вҶ’        }
   258вҶ’        lastScrollY = currentY
   259вҶ’    }
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’    /// иЁҲз®—еҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚпјҲеҗ« bufferпјүвҖ” O(log n) binary search
   262вҶ’    /// yOffsets жҳҜйҒһжёӣжҺ’еҲ—пјҡindex 0 = жңҖдёҠж–№пјҲжңҖеӨ§ yпјүпјҢindex N-1 = жңҖеә•йғЁпјҲжңҖе°Ҹ yпјү
   263вҶ’    func calculateVisibleRange(for visibleRect: NSRect) -> ClosedRange<Int> {
   264вҶ’        guard !imageSizes.isEmpty else { return 0...0 }
   265вҶ’
   266вҶ’        let count = imageSizes.count
   267вҶ’
   268вҶ’        // з”Ё calculateCurrentIndex (binary search) жүҫеҲ°еҢ…еҗ« visibleRect йӮҠз•Ңзҡ„ең–зүҮ
   269вҶ’        let firstVisible = calculateCurrentIndex(for: visibleRect.maxY)   // й Ӯз«Ҝ вҶ’ жңҖдёҠж–№зҡ„еҸҜиҰӢең–зүҮ
   270вҶ’        let lastVisible = calculateCurrentIndex(for: visibleRect.minY)    // еә•з«Ҝ вҶ’ жңҖеә•йғЁзҡ„еҸҜиҰӢең–зүҮ
   271вҶ’
   272вҶ’        // еҠ дёҠ buffer
   273вҶ’        let bufferedFirst = max(0, firstVisible - bufferCount)
   274вҶ’        let bufferedLast = min(count - 1, lastVisible + bufferCount)
   275вҶ’
   276вҶ’        return bufferedFirst...bufferedLast
   277вҶ’    }
   278вҶ’
   279вҶ’    /// Dequeue жҲ–е»әз«Ӣж–°зҡ„ slot
   280вҶ’    private func dequeueOrCreateSlot() -> ImageSlotView {
   281вҶ’        if let reusable = reusableSlots.popLast() {
   282вҶ’            return reusable
   283вҶ’        }
   284вҶ’        return ImageSlotView(frame: .zero)
   285вҶ’    }
   286вҶ’
   287вҶ’    /// жӘўжҹҘжҢҮе®ҡ index зҡ„ slot жҳҜеҗҰе·ІеӯҳеңЁ
   288вҶ’    private func isSlotActive(for index: Int) -> Bool {
   289вҶ’        activeSlots.contains { $0.imageIndex == index }
   290вҶ’    }
   291вҶ’
   292вҶ’    /// з®ЎзҗҶеҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚе…§зҡ„ slot viewsпјҲview recycling ж ёеҝғж–№жі•пјү
   293вҶ’    /// - Returns: еҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚпјҲеҗ« bufferпјү
   294вҶ’    @discardableResult
   295вҶ’    private func manageSlotViews(for visibleRect: NSRect) -> ClosedRange<Int> {
   296вҶ’        let visibleRange = calculateVisibleRange(for: visibleRect)
   297вҶ’
   298вҶ’        // 1. еӣһж”¶и¶…еҮәзҜ„еңҚзҡ„ slotsпјҲzoom дёӯи·ійҒҺеӣһж”¶пјҢйҳІжӯўй»‘иүІй–ғзҲҚпјү
   299вҶ’        if !isZooming {
   300вҶ’            for slot in activeSlots where !visibleRange.contains(slot.imageIndex) {
   301вҶ’                slot.removeFromSuperview()
   302вҶ’                slot.prepareForReuse()
   303вҶ’                reusableSlots.append(slot)
   304вҶ’            }
   305вҶ’            activeSlots.removeAll { !visibleRange.contains($0.imageIndex) }
   306вҶ’        }
   307вҶ’
   308вҶ’        // 2. зӮәж–°йҖІе…ҘзҜ„еңҚзҡ„ indices е»әз«Ӣ slots
   309вҶ’        for index in visibleRange where !isSlotActive(for: index) {
   310вҶ’            let slot = dequeueOrCreateSlot()
   311вҶ’            slot.imageIndex = index
   312вҶ’            slot.frame = frameForImage(at: index)
   313вҶ’            slot.setScalingFilters(magnification: currentMagFilter, minification: currentMinFilter)
   314вҶ’            addSubview(slot)
   315вҶ’            activeSlots.append(slot)
   316вҶ’            loadImage(for: index, into: slot)
   317вҶ’        }
   318вҶ’
   319вҶ’        return visibleRange
   320вҶ’    }
   321вҶ’
   322вҶ’    /// иЁҲз®—жҢҮе®ҡ index ең–зүҮзҡ„ frame
   323вҶ’    func frameForImage(at index: Int) -> NSRect {
   324вҶ’        guard index < imageSizes.count && index < yOffsets.count else {
   325вҶ’            return .zero
   326вҶ’        }
   327вҶ’        let height = scaledHeights[safe: index] ?? containerWidth / defaultAspectRatio
   328вҶ’        let y = yOffsets[index]
   329вҶ’        return NSRect(x: 0, y: y, width: containerWidth, height: height)
   330вҶ’    }
   331вҶ’
   332вҶ’    // MARK: - Async Image Loading
   333вҶ’
   334вҶ’    private func loadImage(for index: Int, into slot: ImageSlotView) {
   335вҶ’        guard let folder = folder,
   336вҶ’              index < folder.images.count,
   337вҶ’              let loader = imageLoader else { return }
   338вҶ’
   339вҶ’        let item = folder.images[index]
   340вҶ’
   341вҶ’        // еҸ–ж¶Ҳи©І slot еҺҹжңүзҡ„ијүе…Ҙд»»еӢҷ
   342вҶ’        slot.prepareForReuse()
   343вҶ’        slot.imageIndex = index
   344вҶ’
   345вҶ’        // е»әз«Ӣж–°зҡ„ијүе…Ҙд»»еӢҷ
   346вҶ’        let task = Task { [weak self] in
   347вҶ’            guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
   348вҶ’
   349вҶ’            let image: NSImage?
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’            // ж №ж“ҡйЎһеһӢйҒёж“Үијүе…Ҙж–№ејҸ
   352вҶ’            if let pageIndex = item.pdfPageIndex {
   353вҶ’                image = await loader.loadPDFPage(url: item.url, pageIndex: pageIndex)
   354вҶ’            } else {
   355вҶ’                image = await loader.loadImage(at: item.url)
   356вҶ’            }
   357вҶ’
   358вҶ’            guard let image else { return }
   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’            await MainActor.run { [weak self] in
   361вҶ’                // жӘўжҹҘ self е’Ң folder жҳҜеҗҰд»ҚеӯҳеңЁ
   362вҶ’                guard let self,
   363вҶ’                      self.folder != nil else { return }
   364вҶ’                // Stale write йҳІиӯ·пјҡзўәиӘҚ slot д»Қе°ҚжҮүйҖҷеҖӢ index
   365вҶ’                guard slot.imageIndex == index else { return }
   366вҶ’                slot.setImage(image)
   367вҶ’            }
   368вҶ’        }
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’        slot.setLoadTask(task)
   371вҶ’    }
   372вҶ’
   373вҶ’    // MARK: - Prefetch (Phase 3.2)
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’    /// и§ёзҷјй җеҸ–пјҲж №ж“ҡжҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘пјү
   376вҶ’    private func triggerPrefetch(visibleRange: ClosedRange<Int>) {
   377вҶ’        // зҜҖжөҒжӘўжҹҘпјҲ20Hzпјү
   378вҶ’        guard prefetchThrottle.shouldProceed() else { return }
   379вҶ’
   380вҶ’        guard let folder = folder,
   381вҶ’              let loader = imageLoader else { return }
   382вҶ’
   383вҶ’        // иЁҲз®—й җеҸ–зҜ„еңҚ
   384вҶ’        let prefetchCount = 5
   385вҶ’        let prefetchStart: Int
   386вҶ’        let prefetchEnd: Int
   387вҶ’
   388вҶ’        if isScrollingDown {
   389вҶ’            prefetchStart = visibleRange.upperBound + 1
   390вҶ’            prefetchEnd = min(folder.images.count - 1, visibleRange.upperBound + prefetchCount)
   391вҶ’        } else {
   392вҶ’            prefetchStart = max(0, visibleRange.lowerBound - prefetchCount)
   393вҶ’            prefetchEnd = visibleRange.lowerBound - 1
   394вҶ’        }
   395вҶ’
   396вҶ’        guard prefetchStart <= prefetchEnd else { return }
   397вҶ’
   398вҶ’        // и§ёзҷј ImageLoader й җеҸ–
   399вҶ’        let direction: PrefetchDirection = isScrollingDown ? .forward : .backward
   400вҶ’        Task {
   401вҶ’            await loader.updateCache(
   402вҶ’                currentIndex: visibleRange.lowerBound,
   403вҶ’                items: folder.images,
   404вҶ’                prefetchDirection: direction
   405вҶ’            )
   406вҶ’        }
   407вҶ’    }
   408вҶ’
   409вҶ’    // MARK: - Index Tracking
   410вҶ’
   411вҶ’    /// йҖҡзҹҘең–зүҮи®Ҡжӣҙ

   434вҶ’    private func setupMemoryPressureMonitor() {
   435вҶ’        memoryPressureMonitor.onPressure = { [weak self] level in
   436вҶ’            self?.handleMemoryPressure(level)

   441вҶ’    /// иҷ•зҗҶиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣ
   442вҶ’    private func handleMemoryPressure(_ level: MemoryPressureMonitor.PressureLevel) {
   443вҶ’        // Zoom дёӯе»¶йҒІиҷ•зҗҶпјҲеҸ– maxпјҡcritical > warningпјү
   444вҶ’        if isZooming {
   445вҶ’            if let existing = pendingPressureLevel {
   446вҶ’                // critical > warningпјҢдҝқз•ҷијғй«ҳзӯүзҙҡ
   447вҶ’                if level == .critical {
   448вҶ’                    pendingPressureLevel = .critical
   449вҶ’                }
   450вҶ’                // warning дёҚиҰҶи“Ӣ critical
   451вҶ’                _ = existing  // suppress unused warning

   454вҶ’            }
   455вҶ’            return
   456вҶ’        }

   459вҶ’
   460вҶ’        switch level {

   463вҶ’            bufferCount = 0
   464вҶ’            needsBufferRestoration = true
   465вҶ’            // и§ёзҷј slot еӣһж”¶пјҲз”Ёзё®жёӣеҫҢзҡ„ bufferпјү
   466вҶ’            let bounds = lastKnownVisibleBounds
   467вҶ’            if !bounds.isEmpty {
   468вҶ’                manageSlotViews(for: bounds)
   469вҶ’            }
   470вҶ’
   471вҶ’        case .critical:
   472вҶ’            // ж ёеҪҲйҒёй …пјҡжё…йҷӨжүҖжңүйқһеҸҜиҰӢ slot
   473вҶ’            bufferCount = 0
   474вҶ’            // еӣһж”¶жүҖжңүйқһеҸҜиҰӢ slots
   475вҶ’            let bounds = lastKnownVisibleBounds
   476вҶ’            if !bounds.isEmpty {

   478вҶ’            }
   479вҶ’            // жё…з©ә reusable pool йҮӢж”ҫиЁҳжҶ¶й«”
   480вҶ’            reusableSlots.removeAll()
   481вҶ’            // жё…йҷӨ ImageLoader еҝ«еҸ–пјҲйқһеҗҢжӯҘпјү
   482вҶ’            guard configurationID == capturedConfigID else { return }
   483вҶ’            Task { [weak self] in

   485вҶ’            }
   486вҶ’        }
   487вҶ’    }

   492вҶ’        pendingPressureLevel = nil
   493вҶ’        needsBufferRestoration = false
   494вҶ’        bufferCount = defaultBufferCount

   525вҶ’    /// scrollY жҳҜжЁҷжә–еә§жЁҷзі»зөұдёӯзҡ„ Y еә§жЁҷпјҲy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјү
   526вҶ’    /// дҪҝз”Ё binary search йҒ”еҲ° O(log n) ж•ҲзҺҮ
   527вҶ’    func calculateCurrentIndex(for scrollY: CGFloat) -> Int {
   528вҶ’        guard !scaledHeights.isEmpty, !yOffsets.isEmpty else { return 0 }
   529вҶ’
   530вҶ’        var low = 0
   531вҶ’        var high = scaledHeights.count - 1
   532вҶ’
   533вҶ’        while low <= high {
   534вҶ’            let mid = (low + high) / 2
   535вҶ’            let yOffset = yOffsets[mid]
   536вҶ’            let height = scaledHeights[mid]
   537вҶ’
   538вҶ’            if scrollY < yOffset {
   539вҶ’                low = mid + 1
   540вҶ’            } else if scrollY >= yOffset + height {
   541вҶ’                high = mid - 1
   542вҶ’            } else {
   543вҶ’                return mid
   544вҶ’            }
   545вҶ’        }
   546вҶ’
   547вҶ’        // и¶…еҮәзҜ„еңҚжҷӮиҝ”еӣһйӮҠз•ҢеҖј
   548вҶ’        return max(0, min(scaledHeights.count - 1, high))
   549вҶ’    }

1вҶ’# Brainstorm: жўқжј«йўЁж јйҖЈзәҢжҚІеӢ•жЁЎејҸ (Continuous Scroll / Webtoon Mode)
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## еҜҰдҪңзӢҖж…Ӣ
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’| Phase | зӢҖж…Ӣ | иӘӘжҳҺ |
     6вҶ’|-------|------|------|
     7вҶ’| Phase 1 | вң… е®ҢжҲҗ | еҹәзӨҺеҸҜз”ЁзүҲпјҡ`ContinuousScrollContentView`гҖҒең–зүҮе°әеҜёй җијүгҖҒfit-to-width дҪҲеұҖгҖҒindex иҝҪи№ӨгҖҒmenu toggle |
     8вҶ’| Phase 2 | вң… е®ҢжҲҗ | еӢ•ж…ӢиҰ–зӘ— Resizeпјҡ`CADisplayLink` еӢ•з•«гҖҒдёӯеҝғй»һдҝқжҢҒгҖҒе…Ёиһўе№•иҷ•зҗҶгҖҒзӢҖж…ӢжҒўеҫ©дҝ®жӯЈ |
     9вҶ’| Phase 3.1 | вң… е®ҢжҲҗ | еҜҰйҡӣең–зүҮжёІжҹ“пјҡ`ImageSlotView` (layer-backed GPU жёІжҹ“)гҖҒview recyclingгҖҒйқһеҗҢжӯҘијүе…Ҙ |
    10вҶ’| Phase 3.2 | вң… е®ҢжҲҗ | жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘ж„ҹзҹҘй җеҸ–пјҡ`NavigationThrottle` 20Hz зҜҖжөҒгҖҒ`PrefetchDirection` ж•ҙеҗҲ |
    11вҶ’| Phase 3.3 | вң… е®ҢжҲҗ | Zoom ж”ҜжҸҙпјҡ`effectiveMinMagnification` 1.0 clampгҖҒmagnification fast pathгҖҒscaling filtersгҖҒжЁЎејҸеҲҮжҸӣ reset |
    12вҶ’| Phase 3.3.1 | вң… е®ҢжҲҗ | Zoom й–ғзҲҚдҝ®еҫ©пјҡ`beginZoomSuppression`/`endZoomSuppression` API + `calculateVisibleRange` O(log n) binary search |
    13вҶ’| Phase 3.4+ | рҹ“Ӣ еҫ…иҫҰ | иЁҳжҶ¶й«”зӣЈжҺ§гҖҒеӨ§ең– subsampleгҖҒйҚөзӣӨе°ҺиҲӘгҖҒQuick GridгҖҒFitting UI йҒ©й…Қ |
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’---
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’## Phase 2 еҜҰдҪңзҙ°зҜҖ
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’### е·Іе®ҢжҲҗеҠҹиғҪ
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’1. **зӢҖж…ӢжҒўеҫ©дҝ®жӯЈ**
    22вҶ’   - `ImageViewController.viewDidAppear()` зҸҫеңЁжңғжӘўжҹҘ `settings.continuousScrollEnabled` дёҰжҒўеҫ©жЁЎејҸ
    23вҶ’   - `validateMenuItem` ж”ҜжҸҙ `toggleContinuousScroll` йҒёй …йЎҜзӨәеӢҫйҒёзӢҖж…Ӣ
    24вҶ’   - `loadFolder(_:)` жӯЈзўәиҷ•зҗҶ `continuousScrollEnabled` иЁӯе®ҡ
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’2. **дҪҲеұҖиҲҮдёӯеҝғдҝ®жӯЈ**
    27вҶ’   - `applyCenteringInsetsIfNeeded()` еңЁйҖЈзәҢжҚІеӢ•жЁЎејҸдёӢдҪҝз”Ё fit-to-width insets
    28вҶ’   - `scrollRange(for:)` ж”ҜжҸҙйҖЈзәҢжҚІеӢ•жЁЎејҸзҡ„ document size
    29вҶ’   - `currentDocumentSize` еңЁйҖЈзәҢжҚІеӢ•жЁЎејҸдёӢдҪҝз”Ё `imageSizes`
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’3. **Status Bar дҝ®жӯЈ**
    32вҶ’   - `updateStatusBar()` еңЁйҖЈзәҢжҚІеӢ•жЁЎејҸдёӢдҪҝз”Ё `continuousScrollContentView?.imageSizes[safe: folder.currentIndex]`
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’4. **CADisplayLink еӢ•ж…Ӣ Resize**
    35вҶ’   - `ImageWindowController.animateResize()` дҪҝз”Ё CADisplayLink е№іж»‘еӢ•з•«
    36вҶ’   - дёӯеҝғй»һдҝқжҢҒиЁҲз®—
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’5. **еә§жЁҷзі»зөұ**
    39вҶ’   - `ContinuousScrollContentView` дҪҝз”ЁжЁҷжә– macOS еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҲy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјүд»Ҙй…ҚеҗҲ `ImageScrollView` зҡ„ unflipped иЎҢзӮә
    40вҶ’   - Binary search (O(log n)) з”Ёж–ј index tracking
    41вҶ’   - `scaledHeights` cache йҒҝе…ҚйҮҚиӨҮиЁҲз®—
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’---
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’## Phase 3 еҜҰдҪңзҙ°зҜҖ
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’### вң… 3.1 еҜҰйҡӣең–зүҮжёІжҹ“пјҲе·Іе®ҢжҲҗпјү
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’**еҜҰдҪңжӘ”жЎҲ**пјҡ
    50вҶ’- `Cee/Views/ImageSlotView.swift` - Layer-backed GPU жёІжҹ“ slot
    51вҶ’- `Cee/Views/ContinuousScrollContentView.swift` - View recycling йӮҸијҜ
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’**жҠҖиЎ“ж–№жЎҲ**пјҡ
    54вҶ’- `ImageSlotView` дҪҝз”Ё `wantsUpdateLayer = true` + `layer.contents = cgImage`

   191вҶ’### ж ёеҝғжһ¶ж§ӢпјҡContinuousScrollContentView
   192вҶ’
   193вҶ’```
   194вҶ’ImageScrollView (NSScrollView)
   195вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ NSClipView
   196вҶ’    в””в”Җв”Җ ContinuousScrollContentView (documentView, frame.height = жүҖжңүең–зүҮзёҪй«ҳеәҰ)
   197вҶ’        в”ңв”Җв”Җ ImageSlotView[0] (recycled, layer.contents = cgImage)
   198вҶ’        в”ңв”Җв”Җ ImageSlotView[1] (recycled, layer.contents = cgImage)

   201вҶ’```
   202вҶ’
   203вҶ’### й—ңйҚөиЁӯиЁҲжұәе®ҡ
   204вҶ’
   205вҶ’| й …зӣ® | жҺЁи–Ұж–№жЎҲ | зҗҶз”ұ |
   206вҶ’|------|---------|------|
   207вҶ’| DocumentView зӯ–з•Ҙ | е–®дёҖй«ҳж–Үд»¶иҰ–ең– + view recycling | AppKit ж”ҜжҸҙжҘөеӨ§еә§жЁҷз©әй–“пјҲHelftone е·Ій©—иӯүпјү |
   208вҶ’| View Recycling | `reflectScrolledClipView` + pool | NSScrollView жІ’жңү cell reuseпјҢйҖҷжҳҜ canonical еҒҡжі• |
   209вҶ’| ең–зүҮе°әеҜё | е•ҹеӢ•жҷӮ pre-scan headersпјҲ~0.1ms/ејөпјү | Cee е·Іжңү `sampleMedianAspectRatio` е’Ң `imageSizeCache` еҸҜиӨҮз”Ё |
   210вҶ’| жёІжҹ“ | `layer.contents = cgImage`пјҲGPUпјү | Cee ж—ўжңүжЁЎејҸпјҢ60fps дҝқиӯү |
   211вҶ’| еҜ¬еәҰзӯ–з•Ҙ | Fit-to-widthпјҲжүҖжңүең–зөұдёҖеҜ¬еәҰпјү | жҘӯз•ҢжЁҷжә–пјҢдҪҲеұҖжңҖз°ЎжҪ” |
   212вҶ’| Pool еӨ§е°Ҹ | visible + 2Г—buffer вүҲ 8-12 slots | и¶іеӨ е№іж»‘жҚІеӢ•еҸҲдёҚжөӘиІ»иЁҳжҶ¶й«” |
   213вҶ’
   214вҶ’### View Recycling ж ёеҝғжЁЎејҸ
   215вҶ’
   216вҶ’```swift
   217вҶ’// reflectScrolledClipView вҖ” canonical hook for AppKit scroll-driven updates
   218вҶ’override func reflectScrolledClipView(_ cView: NSClipView) {
   219вҶ’    super.reflectScrolledClipView(cView)
   220вҶ’    let visibleRect = documentVisibleRect
   221вҶ’    let visibleRange = calculateVisibleRange(for: visibleRect, buffer: 2)
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’    // Recycle out-of-range slots
   224вҶ’    for slot in activeSlots where !visibleRange.contains(slot.imageIndex) {
   225вҶ’        slot.removeFromSuperview()
   226вҶ’        slot.prepareForReuse()  // clear layer.contents
   227вҶ’        reusableSlots.append(slot)
   228вҶ’    }
   229вҶ’
   230вҶ’    // Place newly visible slots
   231вҶ’    for index in visibleRange where !isSlotActive(for: index) {
   232вҶ’        let slot = dequeueOrCreateSlot()
   233вҶ’        slot.frame = frameForImage(at: index)
   234вҶ’        documentView?.addSubview(slot)
   235вҶ’        loadImage(for: index, into: slot)
   236вҶ’    }
   237вҶ’}
   238вҶ’```
   239вҶ’

   244вҶ’- `NavigationThrottle` вҖ” 20Hz жҚІеӢ•зҜҖжөҒ
   245вҶ’- `ThumbnailThrottle` вҖ” дёҰиЎҢи§ЈзўјйҷҗеҲ¶пјҲmax 4пјү
   246вҶ’- `MemoryPressureMonitor` вҖ” иЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣзӣЈжҺ§
   247вҶ’- `imageSizeCache` вҖ” ең–зүҮе°әеҜёеҝ«еҸ–
   248вҶ’- `FittingCalculator` вҖ” Width-only fitting

   254вҶ’### еӢ•з•«ж–№жЎҲжҜ”ијғ
   255вҶ’
   256вҶ’| ж–№жЎҲ | е„Әзјәй»һ | и©•зҙҡ |
   257вҶ’|------|--------|------|
   258вҶ’| `setFrame(animate: true)` | жңҖз°Ўе–®пјҢдҪҶйҳ»еЎһдё»з·ҡзЁӢгҖҒз„Ўжі•дёӯж–· | C |

   260вҶ’| **`window.displayLink()`** (macOS 14+) | еҸҜйҮҚе®ҡеҗ‘гҖҒdisplay-awareгҖҒеҸҜдёӯж–· | **A** |
   261вҶ’
   262вҶ’**жҺЁи–Ұ CADisplayLink**пјҡйҖЈзәҢжҚІеӢ•жҷӮгҖҢзӣ®жЁҷең–зүҮгҖҚеҝ«йҖҹи®ҠеҢ–пјҢеӢ•з•«еҝ…й ҲиғҪдёӯйҖ”йҮҚж–°жҢҮеҗ‘ж–°зӣ®жЁҷгҖӮ
   263вҶ’
   264вҶ’```swift
   265вҶ’// macOS 14+ вҖ” еҫһ window еҸ–еҫ— display link
   266вҶ’let displayLink = window.displayLink(target: self, selector: #selector(animationStep(_:)))
   267вҶ’
   268вҶ’@objc func animationStep(_ link: CADisplayLink) {
   269вҶ’    let progress = min(1.0, elapsedTime / animationDuration)
   270вҶ’    let easedProgress = easeInOut(progress)
   271вҶ’    let currentFrame = interpolate(from: startFrame, to: targetFrame, t: easedProgress)
   272вҶ’    window.setFrame(currentFrame, display: true)
   273вҶ’    if progress >= 1.0 { link.invalidate() }
   274вҶ’}
   275вҶ’```
   276вҶ’
   277вҶ’### дёӯеҝғй»һдҝқжҢҒжј”з®—жі•
   278вҶ’
   279вҶ’```swift
   280вҶ’func centeredFrame(for newSize: NSSize, relativeTo current: NSRect) -> NSRect {
   281вҶ’    let cx = current.midX, cy = current.midY
   282вҶ’    return NSRect(x: cx - newSize.width/2, y: cy - newSize.height/2,
   283вҶ’                  width: newSize.width, height: newSize.height)
   284вҶ’}
   285вҶ’// + screen edge clamping via screen.visibleFrame
   286вҶ’```
   287вҶ’

   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’## 3. Trackpad pinch zoom еңЁй«ҳ loading жҷӮиў«дёӯж–·
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’### зҸҫжіҒ
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’- Pinch з”ұ `GridCollectionView.magnify(with:)` жҺҘж”¶пјҢе‘јеҸ« `onCellSizeChange` вҶ’ `applyItemSize`
   118вҶ’- й«ҳ loading жҷӮ main thread еҸҜиғҪиў«дҪ”з”Ёпјҡ

   121вҶ’  - Thumbnail е®ҢжҲҗпјҡ`setThumbnail`гҖҒ`enforceGridThumbnailCap` зӯүеӣһе‘ј
   122вҶ’
   123вҶ’### и§Јжұәж–№жЎҲжҰӮеҝө
   124вҶ’
   125вҶ’**A. йҷҚдҪҺ pinch жңҹй–“зҡ„ main thread иІ ж“”пјҲжҺЁи–Ұпјү**

   127вҶ’1. **Tier и®ҠжӣҙжҷӮе»¶йҒІ reload**пјҡpinch йҖІиЎҢдёӯпјҲдҫӢеҰӮ `magnification` дәӢд»¶йҖЈзәҢи§ёзҷјпјүжҷӮпјҢиӢҘи·Ёи¶Ҡ tierпјҢдёҚз«ӢеҚі `reloadVisibleThumbnails()`пјҢж”№зӮәиЁӯдёҖеҖӢ ~150ms зҡ„ idle timerпјҢжүӢеӢўеҒңжӯўеҫҢеҶҚеҹ·иЎҢ
   128вҶ’2. **Thumbnail е®ҢжҲҗжү№ж¬ЎеҢ–**пјҡеӨҡејө thumbnail еҗҢжҷӮе®ҢжҲҗжҷӮпјҢж”№зӮә `DispatchQueue.main.async` еҗҲдҪөеҲ°дёӢдёҖ frameпјҢйҒҝе…ҚеҗҢдёҖ run loop е…§йҖЈзәҢеӨҡеҖӢ `setThumbnail`
   129вҶ’

   134вҶ’
   135вҶ’**C. з°ЎеҢ– tier и®ҠжӣҙжҷӮзҡ„иҷ•зҗҶ**

   138вҶ’- еҸҜж”№зӮәеҸӘ cancelпјҢдёҚз«ӢеҚі reloadпјҢи®“ scroll жҷӮзҡ„ prefetch иҮӘз„¶иЈңдёҠпјҲжёӣе°‘ pinch зһ¬й–“зҡ„иІ ж“”пјү

### дёҖгҖҒзҸҫжңү Subsample дҪҝз”Ёжғ…жіҒ

#### 1.1 зҸҫжңүеҜҰдҪңдҪҚзҪ®

```swift
// Phase 3.1: SubsampleFactor for JPEG/HEIF DCT fast path at micro-thumbnail sizes
let subsample: Int
if maxSize <= Constants.quickGridSubsampleThresholdPx {
    subsample = 4
    options[kCGImageSourceSubsampleFactor] = subsample
} else {
    subsample = 1
}
```

**й—ңйҚөзү№жҖ§**пјҡ

```
targetDisplayWidth = containerWidth
targetDisplayHeight = scaledHeights[index]
magnification = 1.0 (fit-to-width baseline)

sourceWidth, sourceHeight = imageSizes[index]
effectiveDisplayWidth = targetDisplayWidth * magnification  // = containerWidth
effectiveDisplayHeight = targetDisplayHeight * magnification // = scaledHeights[index]

// жұәзӯ–пјҡиӢҘи§ЈзўјеҲ°йЎҜзӨәе°әеҜёзҡ„дёҠжҺЎжЁЈзҺҮи¶…йҒҺй–ҫеҖјпјҢдҪҝз”Ё subsample
upsampleRatio = sourceWidth / effectiveDisplayWidth
```

content.content:
1вҶ’# Phase 3.5: Large Image Subsample for Continuous Scroll
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## Overview
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’Use `kCGImageSourceSubsampleFactor` and `CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex` to reduce memory usage for large images in continuous scroll mode. When a 4K image (3840px) is displayed at containerWidth (800px), full decode wastes ~4x memory. Subsample at decode time to match display needs.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’**Key insight**: The existing `loadImage(at:)` always decodes full resolution. `decodeThumbnailWithDimensions` already uses subsample for Quick Grid. We extend this approach to the main image loading path for continuous scroll.
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’## Implementation Steps
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’### Step 1: Add `loadImageForDisplay(at:maxWidth:)` to ImageLoader
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’**File:** `Cee/Services/ImageLoader.swift`
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’Add a new method that loads images at a target display width:
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’```swift
    18вҶ’func loadImageForDisplay(at url: URL, maxWidth: CGFloat) async -> NSImage? {
    19вҶ’    // Check cache first (same cache as loadImage)
    20вҶ’    if let cached = cache[url] { return cached }
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’    // Decode with subsample awareness
    23вҶ’    let image = try? await Task.detached(priority: .userInitiated) {
    24вҶ’        self.decodeImageForDisplay(at: url, maxWidth: maxWidth)
    25вҶ’    }.value
    26вҶ’
    27вҶ’    if let image { cache[url] = image }
    28вҶ’    return image
    29вҶ’}
    30вҶ’```
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’### Step 2: Add `decodeImageForDisplay(at:maxWidth:)` to ImageLoader
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’**File:** `Cee/Services/ImageLoader.swift`
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’Internal decode method that decides whether to subsample:
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’```swift
    39вҶ’private nonisolated func decodeImageForDisplay(at url: URL, maxWidth: CGFloat) -> NSImage? {
    40вҶ’    guard let source = CGImageSourceCreateWithURL(url as CFURL, nil) else { return nil }
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’    // Read source dimensions
    43вҶ’    guard let properties = CGImageSourceCopyPropertiesAtIndex(source, 0, nil) as? [CFString: Any],
    44вҶ’          let pixelWidth = properties[kCGImagePropertyPixelWidth] as? CGFloat,
    45вҶ’          let pixelHeight = properties[kCGImagePropertyPixelHeight] as? CGFloat else {
    46вҶ’        // Fallback to full decode
    47вҶ’        return decodeImage(at: url)
    48вҶ’    }
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’    // Account for EXIF orientation (5-8 swap w/h)
    51вҶ’    let orientation = properties[kCGImagePropertyOrientation] as? UInt32 ?? 1
    52вҶ’    let sourceWidth = (orientation >= 5 && orientation <= 8) ? pixelHeight : pixelWidth
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’    // Calculate subsample factor
    55вҶ’    let ratio = sourceWidth / (maxWidth * 2.0)  // 2.0 for Retina
    56вҶ’    let subsampleFactor: Int
    57вҶ’    if ratio >= 4.0 {
    58вҶ’        subsampleFactor = 4
    59вҶ’    } else if ratio >= 2.0 {
    60вҶ’        subsampleFactor = 2
    61вҶ’    } else {
    62вҶ’        // No subsample needed вҖ” use full decode
    63вҶ’        return decodeImage(at: url)
    64вҶ’    }
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’    // Use thumbnail API with subsample
    67вҶ’    let maxPixelSize = max(pixelWidth, pixelHeight) / CGFloat(subsampleFactor)
    68вҶ’    let options: [CFString: Any] = [
    69вҶ’        kCGImageSourceCreateThumbnailFromImageAlways: true,
    70вҶ’        kCGImageSourceCreateThumbnailWithTransform: true,  // EXIF auto-rotate
    71вҶ’        kCGImageSourceThumbnailMaxPixelSize: maxPixelSize,
    72вҶ’        kCGImageSourceSubsampleFactor: subsampleFactor,
    73вҶ’        kCGImageSourceShouldCacheImmediately: true
    74вҶ’    ]
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’    guard let cgImage = CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex(source, 0, options as CFDictionary) else {
    77вҶ’        return decodeImage(at: url)  // Fallback
    78вҶ’    }
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’    return NSImage(cgImage: cgImage, size: NSSize(width: cgImage.width, height: cgImage.height))
    81вҶ’}
    82вҶ’```
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’### Step 3: Update ContinuousScrollContentView to use subsampled loading
    85вҶ’
    86вҶ’**File:** `Cee/Views/ContinuousScrollContentView.swift`
    87вҶ’
    88вҶ’In `loadImage(for:into:)`, use `loadImageForDisplay` instead of `loadImage`:
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’```swift
    91вҶ’// Replace:
    92вҶ’image = await loader.loadImage(at: item.url)
    93вҶ’// With:
    94вҶ’let displayWidth = self.containerWidth * (self.window?.backingScaleFactor ?? 2.0)
    95вҶ’image = await loader.loadImageForDisplay(at: item.url, maxWidth: displayWidth)
    96вҶ’```
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’Note: For PDF pages, keep using `loadPDFPage()` (PDF renders at a fixed scale, subsample doesn't apply).
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’### Step 4: Handle zoom вҖ” reload at full resolution when zoomed
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’**File:** `Cee/Views/ContinuousScrollContentView.swift`
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’When magnification > 1.0 (user zoomed in), the subsampled image may look blurry. Handle by:
   105вҶ’- Tracking whether current slots have subsampled images
   106вҶ’- On zoom beyond threshold (e.g., 1.5x), reload visible slots at full resolution
   107вҶ’- On zoom back to 1.0, subsampled versions are acceptable again
   108вҶ’
   109вҶ’For MVP: skip this вҖ” zoom is relatively rare in continuous scroll. The subsampled image at 2x Retina is usually sufficient for moderate zoom. Document as future enhancement.
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’## Trade-offs & Decisions
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’| Decision | Choice | Alternative | Rationale |
   114вҶ’|----------|--------|-------------|-----------|
   115вҶ’| Subsample threshold | sourceWidth / (displayWidth * 2.0) >= 2.0 | Fixed 4K threshold | Adapts to actual display needs; Retina factor included |
   116вҶ’| Subsample factors | 2 and 4 only | Also 8 | CGImageSource only supports 1/2/4/8; 8 too aggressive for main view |
   117вҶ’| Cache key | Same URL key (one display per URL) | (URL, maxWidth) composite key | Continuous scroll shows each image at one size; simpler |
   118вҶ’| Zoom reload | Skip for MVP | Reload visible slots on zoom | Zoom is rare; subsampled at Retina usually sufficient |
   119вҶ’| PDF handling | No subsample (keep existing) | Add PDF subsample | PDF renders from vectors; subsample not applicable |
   120вҶ’| Fallback | Full decode on failure | Return nil | Graceful degradation; image always displayed |
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’## Tests (TDD вҖ” RED phase specs)
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’### Test 1: Large JPEG gets subsampled
   125вҶ’- **Input**: Create 4000x6000 JPEG, call `loadImageForDisplay(at:maxWidth:400)`
   126вҶ’- **Expected**: Returned image dimensions are significantly smaller than source (subsampled by factor 2 or 4)
   127вҶ’- **Module**: `ImageLoader.loadImageForDisplay`
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’### Test 2: Small image is NOT subsampled
   130вҶ’- **Input**: Create 800x600 JPEG, call `loadImageForDisplay(at:maxWidth:800)`
   131вҶ’- **Expected**: Returned image at full resolution (ratio < 2, no subsample)
   132вҶ’- **Module**: `ImageLoader.loadImageForDisplay`
   133вҶ’
   134вҶ’### Test 3: PNG is NOT subsampled (SubsampleFactor only helps JPEG/HEIF)
   135вҶ’- **Input**: Create 4000x6000 PNG, call `loadImageForDisplay(at:maxWidth:400)`
   136вҶ’- **Expected**: Image still loads (may or may not subsample вҖ” PNG subsample is a no-op in CGImageSource but `CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex` still resizes). Image should be valid and smaller.
   137вҶ’- **Module**: `ImageLoader.loadImageForDisplay`
   138вҶ’
   139вҶ’### Test 4: Cache hit returns same image
   140вҶ’- **Input**: Load same URL twice with `loadImageForDisplay`
   141вҶ’- **Expected**: Second call returns cached image (fast, no re-decode)
   142вҶ’- **Module**: `ImageLoader` cache behavior
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’### Test 5: Subsample factor selection
   145вҶ’- **Input**: Various source/display size ratios
   146вҶ’- **Expected**:
   147вҶ’  - ratio < 2.0 вҶ’ no subsample (full decode)
   148вҶ’  - 2.0 <= ratio < 4.0 вҶ’ factor 2
   149вҶ’  - ratio >= 4.0 вҶ’ factor 4
   150вҶ’- **Module**: `ImageLoader.decodeImageForDisplay` (test via `loadImageForDisplay` output dimensions)
   151вҶ’
   152вҶ’## Critical Files for Implementation
   153вҶ’
   154вҶ’- `Cee/Services/ImageLoader.swift` вҖ” Add `loadImageForDisplay` and `decodeImageForDisplay` methods
   155вҶ’- `Cee/Views/ContinuousScrollContentView.swift` вҖ” Update `loadImage(for:into:)` to call new method
   156вҶ’- `Cee/Utilities/Constants.swift` вҖ” No new constants needed (threshold is computed, not fixed)
   157вҶ’- `CeeTests/TestHelpers.swift` вҖ” May need larger test image creation helpers
   158вҶ’- `CeeTests/SubsampleTests.swift` вҖ” New test file for subsample tests (or extend existing)

1вҶ’import AppKit
     2вҶ’import ImageIO
     3вҶ’import PDFKit
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’/// ж–№еҗ‘жҖ§ prefetchпјҡеҫҖзҝ»й Ғж–№еҗ‘еӨҡй җијү
     6вҶ’enum PrefetchDirection {
     7вҶ’    case none
     8вҶ’    case forward
     9вҶ’    case backward
    10вҶ’}
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’/// дҪҝз”Ё actor зўәдҝқеҝ«еҸ–зҡ„еҹ·иЎҢз·’е®үе…Ё
    13вҶ’actor ImageLoader {
    14вҶ’    private var cache: [URL: NSImage] = [:]
    15вҶ’    /// зё®ең–еҝ«еҸ–пјҡеҗҢжҷӮеӯҳ image е’Ң fullSizeпјҢйҒҝе…Қ cache-hit жҷӮдәҢж¬Ўй–ӢжӘ”
    16вҶ’    private struct ThumbnailEntry {
    17вҶ’        let image: NSImage
    18вҶ’        let fullSize: CGSize
    19вҶ’    }
    20вҶ’    /// Composite key: same URL with different maxSize produces separate cache entries.
    21вҶ’    /// Prevents grid (240/480px) and main view (512px) thumbnails from cross-contaminating.
    22вҶ’    private struct ThumbnailCacheKey: Hashable {
    23вҶ’        let url: URL
    24вҶ’        let maxSize: CGFloat
    25вҶ’    }
    26вҶ’    private var thumbnailCache: [ThumbnailCacheKey: ThumbnailEntry] = [:]
    27вҶ’    private let thumbnailThrottle = ThumbnailThrottle()
    28вҶ’    private var pdfCache: [PDFCacheKey: NSImage] = [:]
    29вҶ’    private var pdfDocumentCache: [URL: PDFDocument] = [:]
    30вҶ’    private let cacheRadius = Constants.cacheRadius
    31вҶ’    private let prefetchExtra = Constants.prefetchDirectionExtraCount
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’    // иҝҪи№Өй җијүд»»еӢҷпјҲж”ҜжҸҙеҸ–ж¶Ҳпјү
    34вҶ’    private var prefetchTasks: [PDFCacheKey: Task<Void, Never>] = [:]
    35вҶ’    private var imagePrefetchTasks: [URL: Task<Void, Never>] = [:]
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’    /// PDF й Ғйқўеҝ«еҸ–зҡ„ keyпјҲеӣәе®ҡд»Ҙ 2x Retina жёІжҹ“пјҢз„ЎйңҖеҚҖеҲҶ scaleпјү
    38вҶ’    private struct PDFCacheKey: Hashable {
    39вҶ’        let url: URL
    40вҶ’        let pageIndex: Int
    41вҶ’    }
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’    /// дҪҝз”Ё CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex еҝ«йҖҹијүе…ҘдҪҺи§ЈжһҗеәҰзё®ең–пјҲJPEG ~16msпјү
    44вҶ’    /// еҗҢжҷӮеӣһеӮі full-res dimensionsпјҲеҫһеҗҢдёҖеҖӢ CGImageSource и®ҖеҸ–пјҢйҒҝе…ҚдәҢж¬Ўй–ӢжӘ”пјү
    45вҶ’    /// PDF дёҚж”ҜжҸҙпјҢеӣһеӮі nil
    46вҶ’    /// - Parameter throttlePriority: Smaller = higher urgency. 0 = highest (default, for non-grid callers).
    47вҶ’    ///   Grid callers pass `abs(index - visibleCenter)` as distance-based priority.
    48вҶ’    func loadThumbnail(at url: URL, maxSize: CGFloat = 512, priority: TaskPriority = .userInitiated, throttlePriority: Int = 0) async -> (image: NSImage, fullSize: CGSize)? {
    49вҶ’        let cacheKey = ThumbnailCacheKey(url: url, maxSize: maxSize)
    50вҶ’        if let cached = thumbnailCache[cacheKey] {
    51вҶ’            return (cached.image, cached.fullSize)
    52вҶ’        }
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’        let result = await thumbnailThrottle.withThrottle(priority: throttlePriority) {
    55вҶ’            () async -> (image: NSImage, fullSize: CGSize)? in
    56вҶ’            // Skip expensive decode if caller was cancelled while waiting in queue
    57вҶ’            guard !Task.isCancelled else { return nil }
    58вҶ’            return await Task.detached(priority: priority) {
    59вҶ’                Self.decodeThumbnailWithDimensions(at: url, maxSize: maxSize)
    60вҶ’            }.value
    61вҶ’        }
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’        // Don't cache if caller's Task was cancelled (e.g. Quick Grid dismissed).
    64вҶ’        if let result, !Task.isCancelled {
    65вҶ’            thumbnailCache[cacheKey] = ThumbnailEntry(image: result.image, fullSize: result.fullSize)
    66вҶ’        }
    67вҶ’        return result
    68вҶ’    }
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’    func loadImage(at url: URL) async -> NSImage? {
    71вҶ’        if let cached = cache[url] { return cached }
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’        // еңЁиғҢжҷҜ Task и§ЈзўјпјҢйҒҝе…Қйҳ»еЎһ MainActor
    74вҶ’        let image = await Task.detached(priority: .userInitiated) {
    75вҶ’            Self.decodeImage(at: url)
    76вҶ’        }.value
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’        if let image { cache[url] = image }
    79вҶ’        return image
    80вҶ’    }
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’    // MARK: - PDF Loading
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’    func loadPDFPage(url: URL, pageIndex: Int) async -> NSImage? {
    85вҶ’        let key = PDFCacheKey(url: url, pageIndex: pageIndex)
    86вҶ’        if let cached = pdfCache[key] { return cached }
    87вҶ’
    88вҶ’        let image = renderPDFPage(url: url, pageIndex: pageIndex)
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’        if let image { pdfCache[key] = image }
    91вҶ’        return image
    92вҶ’    }
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’    /// еӣәе®ҡдҪҝз”Ё 2x Retina scale жёІжҹ“пјҲе№ҫд№ҺжүҖжңү Mac йғҪжҳҜ RetinaпјҢйқһ Retina йЎҜзӨә 2x з„Ўе®іпјү
    95вҶ’    private static let renderScale: CGFloat = 2.0
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’    private func renderPDFPage(url: URL, pageIndex: Int) -> NSImage? {
    98вҶ’        let backingScale = Self.renderScale
    99вҶ’        // ж—©жңҹеҸ–ж¶ҲжӘўжҹҘ
   100вҶ’        guard !Task.isCancelled else { return nil }
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’        // 1. еҸ–еҫ—жҲ–е»әз«Ӣ PDFDocument
   103вҶ’        let doc: PDFDocument
   104вҶ’        if let cached = pdfDocumentCache[url] {
   105вҶ’            doc = cached
   106вҶ’        } else {
   107вҶ’            guard let newDoc = PDFDocument(url: url) else { return nil }
   108вҶ’            pdfDocumentCache[url] = newDoc
   109вҶ’            doc = newDoc
   110вҶ’        }
   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’        // ијүе…Ҙж–Үд»¶еҫҢжӘўжҹҘ
   113вҶ’        guard !Task.isCancelled else { return nil }
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’        guard let page = doc.page(at: pageIndex) else { return nil }
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’        // 2. еҸ–еҫ—й Ғйқўе°әеҜёпјҲиҖғж…®ж—ӢиҪүеҫҢзҡ„еҜҰйҡӣйЎҜзӨәе°әеҜёпјү
   118вҶ’        let pageBounds = page.bounds(for: .cropBox)
   119вҶ’        let rotation = page.rotation
   120вҶ’
   121вҶ’        // иЁҲз®—ж—ӢиҪүеҫҢзҡ„еҜҰйҡӣйЎҜзӨәе°әеҜёпјҲpointsпјү
   122вҶ’        let pointSize: CGSize
   123вҶ’        if rotation == 90 || rotation == 270 {
   124вҶ’            // ж—ӢиҪү 90 жҲ– 270 еәҰжҷӮпјҢеҜ¬й«ҳдә’жҸӣ
   125вҶ’            pointSize = CGSize(width: pageBounds.height, height: pageBounds.width)
   126вҶ’        } else {
   127вҶ’            pointSize = pageBounds.size
   128вҶ’        }
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’        // 3. е»әз«Ӣ NSBitmapImageRep д»Ҙж”ҜжҸҙ Retina зё®ж”ҫ
   131вҶ’        let pixelSize = CGSize(
   132вҶ’            width: pointSize.width * backingScale,
   133вҶ’            height: pointSize.height * backingScale
   134вҶ’        )
   135вҶ’
   136вҶ’        // еғҸзҙ дёҠйҷҗдҝқиӯ·пјҡи¶…йҒҺ 1 е„„еғҸзҙ пјҲвүҲ400MB RGBAпјүжҷӮи·ійҒҺпјҢйҳІжӯўжҘөеӨ§й Ғйқў OOM
   137вҶ’        let totalPixels = pixelSize.width * pixelSize.height
   138вҶ’        guard totalPixels > 0, totalPixels <= 100_000_000 else { return nil }
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’        guard let bitmapRep = NSBitmapImageRep(
   141вҶ’            bitmapDataPlanes: nil,
   142вҶ’            pixelsWide: Int(pixelSize.width),
   143вҶ’            pixelsHigh: Int(pixelSize.height),
   144вҶ’            bitsPerSample: 8,
   145вҶ’            samplesPerPixel: 4,
   146вҶ’            hasAlpha: true,
   147вҶ’            isPlanar: false,
   148вҶ’            colorSpaceName: .deviceRGB,
   149вҶ’            bytesPerRow: 0,  // и®“ CG иҮӘеӢ•е°ҚйҪҠ
   150вҶ’            bitsPerPixel: 0
   151вҶ’        ) else { return nil }
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’        // 4. е»әз«Ӣ NSImage дёҰеҠ е…Ҙ bitmap representation
   154вҶ’        let image = NSImage(size: pointSize)
   155вҶ’        image.addRepresentation(bitmapRep)
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’        // 5. дҪҝз”Ё NSGraphicsContext з№ӘиЈҪ
   158вҶ’        guard let ctx = NSGraphicsContext(bitmapImageRep: bitmapRep) else { return nil }
   159вҶ’        NSGraphicsContext.saveGraphicsState()
   160вҶ’        NSGraphicsContext.current = ctx
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’        let cgCtx = ctx.cgContext
   163вҶ’
   164вҶ’        // 6. еҘ—з”Ё scale и®ҠжҸӣд»Ҙй…ҚеҗҲ pixel е°әеҜё
   165вҶ’        cgCtx.scaleBy(x: backingScale, y: backingScale)
   166вҶ’
   167вҶ’        // 7. еЎ«зҷҪиүІиғҢжҷҜ
   168вҶ’        cgCtx.setFillColor(CGColor.white)
   169вҶ’        cgCtx.fill(CGRect(origin: .zero, size: pointSize))
   170вҶ’
   171вҶ’        // 8. иҷ•зҗҶж—ӢиҪүи®ҠжҸӣ
   172вҶ’        if rotation != 0 {
   173вҶ’            cgCtx.saveGState()
   174вҶ’
   175вҶ’            // е№із§»еҲ°дёӯеҝғй»һ
   176вҶ’            cgCtx.translateBy(x: pointSize.width / 2, y: pointSize.height / 2)
   177вҶ’            // ж—ӢиҪүпјҲrotation жҳҜеәҰж•ёпјҢйңҖиҪүеј§еәҰпјӣиІ иҷҹеӣ зӮә CG еә§жЁҷзі» Y и»ёеҗ‘дёҠпјү
   178вҶ’            cgCtx.rotate(by: -CGFloat(rotation) * .pi / 180)
   179вҶ’            // е№із§»еӣһеҺ»пјҲеҹәж–јеҺҹе§Ӣ pageBoundsпјү
   180вҶ’            cgCtx.translateBy(x: -pageBounds.width / 2, y: -pageBounds.height / 2)
   181вҶ’        }
   182вҶ’
   183вҶ’        // 9. з№ӘиЈҪ PDF й Ғйқў
   184вҶ’        page.draw(with: .cropBox, to: cgCtx)
   185вҶ’
   186вҶ’        if rotation != 0 {
   187вҶ’            cgCtx.restoreGState()
   188вҶ’        }
   189вҶ’
   190вҶ’        NSGraphicsContext.restoreGraphicsState()
   191вҶ’        return image
   192вҶ’    }
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’    // MARK: - Image Loading
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’    /// PDF URL еҲӨе®ҡпјҲе…ұз”ЁпјҢйҒҝе…Қж•ЈдҪҲ pathExtension жҜ”ијғпјү
   197вҶ’    private static func isPDFURL(_ url: URL) -> Bool {
   198вҶ’        url.pathExtension.caseInsensitiveCompare("pdf") == .orderedSame
   199вҶ’    }
   200вҶ’
   201вҶ’    /// еғ…и®Җ metadata еҸ–еҫ—е°әеҜёпјҲдёҚи§ЈзўјпјҢportrait fit-to-width жҷӮйҒҝе…Қ thumbnailвҶ’fullRes и·іеӢ•пјү
   202вҶ’    private static func readImageDimensions(at url: URL) -> CGSize? {
   203вҶ’        guard !isPDFURL(url) else { return nil }
   204вҶ’        guard let source = CGImageSourceCreateWithURL(url as CFURL, nil) else { return nil }
   205вҶ’        guard let props = CGImageSourceCopyPropertiesAtIndex(source, 0, nil) as NSDictionary? else { return nil }
   206вҶ’        let w = (props[kCGImagePropertyPixelWidth] as? NSNumber)?.intValue ?? 0
   207вҶ’        let h = (props[kCGImagePropertyPixelHeight] as? NSNumber)?.intValue ?? 0
   208вҶ’        guard w > 0, h > 0 else { return nil }
   209вҶ’        return CGSize(width: w, height: h)
   210вҶ’    }
   211вҶ’
   212вҶ’    /// и®ҖеҸ–ең–зүҮе°әеҜёпјҲдёҚи§Јзўје®Ңж•ҙең–зүҮпјүз”Ёж–ј continuous scroll жЁЎејҸ
   213вҶ’    /// - Parameter url: ең–зүҮ URL
   214вҶ’    /// - Returns: ең–зүҮе°әеҜёпјҢе·Іиҷ•зҗҶ EXIF orientation 5-8 зҡ„дәӨжҸӣ
   215вҶ’    func getImageSize(for url: URL) async -> NSSize? {
   216вҶ’        // PDF: иҝ”еӣһ nilпјҲз”ұе…¶д»–йӮҸијҜиҷ•зҗҶпјү
   217вҶ’        guard !Self.isPDFURL(url) else { return nil }
   218вҶ’
   219вҶ’        guard let source = CGImageSourceCreateWithURL(url as CFURL, nil),
   220вҶ’              let props = CGImageSourceCopyPropertiesAtIndex(source, 0, nil) as? [String: Any] else {
   221вҶ’            return nil
   222вҶ’        }
   223вҶ’
   224вҶ’        let w = (props[kCGImagePropertyPixelWidth as String] as? CGFloat) ?? 0
   225вҶ’        let h = (props[kCGImagePropertyPixelHeight as String] as? CGFloat) ?? 0
   226вҶ’        guard w > 0, h > 0 else { return nil }
   227вҶ’
   228вҶ’        // иҷ•зҗҶ EXIF orientation 5-8пјҲ90/270 еәҰж—ӢиҪү)
   229вҶ’        // йҖҷдәӣ orientation зҡ„ pixel dimensions йңҖиҰҒдәӨжҸӣ
   230вҶ’        let orientation = (props[kCGImagePropertyOrientation as String] as? Int) ?? 1
   231вҶ’        if orientation >= 5 && orientation <= 8 {
   232вҶ’            return NSSize(width: h, height: w)
   233вҶ’        }
   234вҶ’        return NSSize(width: w, height: h)
   235вҶ’    }
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’    /// дҪҝз”Ё CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex еҝ«йҖҹи§Јзўјзё®ең–пјҢеҗҢжҷӮи®ҖеҸ– full-res е°әеҜё
   238вҶ’    /// е…ұз”ЁеҗҢдёҖеҖӢ CGImageSourceпјҢйҒҝе…ҚдәҢж¬Ўй–ӢжӘ”
   239вҶ’    private static func decodeThumbnailWithDimensions(at url: URL, maxSize: CGFloat) -> (image: NSImage, fullSize: CGSize)? {
   240вҶ’        guard !isPDFURL(url) else { return nil }
   241вҶ’        let decodeStart = CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent()
   242вҶ’
   243вҶ’        guard let source = CGImageSourceCreateWithURL(url as CFURL, nil) else { return nil }
   244вҶ’        let sourceMs = (CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent() - decodeStart) * 1000
   245вҶ’
   246вҶ’        // и®Җ full-res dimensionsпјҲеҗҢдёҖеҖӢ sourceпјҢйӣ¶йЎҚеӨ– I/Oпјү
   247вҶ’        let fullSize: CGSize
   248вҶ’        if let props = CGImageSourceCopyPropertiesAtIndex(source, 0, nil) as NSDictionary?,
   249вҶ’           let w = (props[kCGImagePropertyPixelWidth] as? NSNumber)?.intValue,
   250вҶ’           let h = (props[kCGImagePropertyPixelHeight] as? NSNumber)?.intValue,
   251вҶ’           w > 0, h > 0 {
   252вҶ’            fullSize = CGSize(width: w, height: h)
   253вҶ’        } else {
   254вҶ’            fullSize = .zero  // fallback: caller жңғз”Ё thumbnail size
   255вҶ’        }
   256вҶ’
   257вҶ’        var options: [CFString: Any] = [
   258вҶ’            kCGImageSourceCreateThumbnailFromImageAlways: true,
   259вҶ’            kCGImageSourceCreateThumbnailWithTransform: true,
   260вҶ’            kCGImageSourceThumbnailMaxPixelSize: maxSize,
   261вҶ’        ]
   262вҶ’        // Phase 3.1: SubsampleFactor for JPEG/HEIF DCT fast path at micro-thumbnail sizes
   263вҶ’        let subsample: Int
   264вҶ’        if maxSize <= Constants.quickGridSubsampleThresholdPx {
   265вҶ’            subsample = 4
   266вҶ’            options[kCGImageSourceSubsampleFactor] = subsample
   267вҶ’        } else {
   268вҶ’            subsample = 1
   269вҶ’        }
   270вҶ’        let thumbStart = CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent()
   271вҶ’        guard let cgImage = CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex(source, 0, options as CFDictionary)
   272вҶ’        else { return nil }
   273вҶ’        let thumbMs = (CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent() - thumbStart) * 1000
   274вҶ’
   275вҶ’        let image = NSImage(cgImage: cgImage, size: NSSize(
   276вҶ’            width: cgImage.width,
   277вҶ’            height: cgImage.height
   278вҶ’        ))
   279вҶ’        let totalMs = (CFAbsoluteTimeGetCurrent() - decodeStart) * 1000
   280вҶ’        GridPerfLog.log(String(format: "decode: total=%.2fms | source=%.2fms | thumb(%dx%dвҶ’%.0f,ss=%d)=%.2fms | %@",
   281вҶ’                               totalMs, sourceMs, cgImage.width, cgImage.height, maxSize, subsample, thumbMs,
   282вҶ’                               url.lastPathComponent))
   283вҶ’
   284вҶ’        let effectiveSize = fullSize == .zero ? image.size : fullSize
   285вҶ’        return (image, effectiveSize)
   286вҶ’    }

   288вҶ’    /// дҪҝз”Ё ImageIO й«ҳж•Ҳи§ЈзўјпјҲжҜ” NSImage(contentsOf:) жӣҙй«ҳж•Ҳпјү
   289вҶ’    private static func decodeImage(at url: URL) -> NSImage? {
   290вҶ’        guard let source = CGImageSourceCreateWithURL(url as CFURL, nil) else { return nil }
   291вҶ’        let options: [CFString: Any] = [
   292вҶ’            kCGImageSourceShouldCache: true,
   293вҶ’            kCGImageSourceShouldAllowFloat: true
   294вҶ’        ]
   295вҶ’        guard let cgImage = CGImageSourceCreateImageAtIndex(source, 0, options as CFDictionary)
   296вҶ’        else { return nil }
   297вҶ’        return NSImage(cgImage: cgImage, size: NSSize(
   298вҶ’            width: cgImage.width,
   299вҶ’            height: cgImage.height
   300вҶ’        ))
   301вҶ’    }

   303вҶ’    /// й җијүз”Ёзҡ„ең–зүҮијүе…ҘпјҲж”ҜжҸҙ cooperative cancellationпјү
   304вҶ’    private func loadImageCooperative(at url: URL) async -> NSImage? {
   305вҶ’        if let cached = cache[url] { return cached }
   306вҶ’        guard !Task.isCancelled else { return nil }
   307вҶ’
   308вҶ’        // дҪҝз”Ё Task иҖҢйқһ Task.detached д»Ҙз№јжүҝ cancellation scope
   309вҶ’        let image = await Task(priority: .userInitiated) { () -> NSImage? in
   310вҶ’            guard !Task.isCancelled else { return nil }
   311вҶ’            return Self.decodeImage(at: url)
   312вҶ’        }.value
   313вҶ’
   314вҶ’        guard !Task.isCancelled else { return nil }
   315вҶ’        if let image { cache[url] = image }
   316вҶ’        return image
   317вҶ’    }
   318вҶ’
   319вҶ’    /// еҸ–ж¶ҲжҢҮе®ҡ item зҡ„й җијүд»»еӢҷ
   320вҶ’    func cancelLoad(for item: ImageItem) {
   321вҶ’        if let pageIndex = item.pdfPageIndex {
   322вҶ’            let key = PDFCacheKey(url: item.url, pageIndex: pageIndex)
   323вҶ’            prefetchTasks[key]?.cancel()
   324вҶ’            prefetchTasks.removeValue(forKey: key)
   325вҶ’        } else {
   326вҶ’            imagePrefetchTasks[item.url]?.cancel()
   327вҶ’            imagePrefetchTasks.removeValue(forKey: item.url)
   328вҶ’        }
   329вҶ’    }
   330вҶ’
   331вҶ’    /// й җијүе‘ЁеңҚй …зӣ®пјҲең–зүҮжҲ– PDF й ҒйқўпјүпјҢйҮӢж”ҫйҒ йӣўзҡ„еҝ«еҸ–
   332вҶ’    /// ж–№еҗ‘жҖ§ prefetchпјҡеҫҖ direction ж–№еҗ‘еӨҡй җијү prefetchExtra ејө
   333вҶ’    /// вҡ пёҸ жҺҘж”¶еҖјеһӢеҲҘеҸғж•ёпјҲImageItem жҳҜ Sendable structпјүйҒҝе…Қ Swift 6 Sendable е•ҸйЎҢ
   334вҶ’    func updateCache(currentIndex: Int, items: [ImageItem], prefetchDirection: PrefetchDirection = .none) {
   335вҶ’        guard !items.isEmpty else { return }
   336вҶ’
   337вҶ’        let range: ClosedRange<Int>
   338вҶ’        switch prefetchDirection {
   339вҶ’        case .forward:
   340вҶ’            range = max(0, currentIndex - cacheRadius)...min(items.count - 1, currentIndex + cacheRadius + prefetchExtra)
   341вҶ’        case .backward:
   342вҶ’            range = max(0, currentIndex - cacheRadius - prefetchExtra)...min(items.count - 1, currentIndex + cacheRadius)
   343вҶ’        case .none:
   344вҶ’            range = max(0, currentIndex - cacheRadius)...min(items.count - 1, currentIndex + cacheRadius)
   345вҶ’        }
   346вҶ’
   347вҶ’        // иЁҲз®—йңҖиҰҒзҡ„ keys
   348вҶ’        let activeImageURLs = Set(items[range].filter { !$0.isPDF }.map(\.url))
   349вҶ’        let activePDFKeys = Set(items[range].compactMap { item in
   350вҶ’            item.pdfPageIndex.map { PDFCacheKey(url: item.url, pageIndex: $0) }
   351вҶ’        })
   352вҶ’        let activePDFURLs = Set(items[range].filter { $0.isPDF }.map(\.url))
   353вҶ’
   354вҶ’        // еҸ–ж¶ҲдёҚеңЁзҜ„еңҚе…§зҡ„й җијүд»»еӢҷ
   355вҶ’        for (url, task) in imagePrefetchTasks where !activeImageURLs.contains(url) {
   356вҶ’            task.cancel()
   357вҶ’            imagePrefetchTasks.removeValue(forKey: url)
   358вҶ’        }
   359вҶ’        for (key, task) in prefetchTasks where !activePDFKeys.contains(key) {
   360вҶ’            task.cancel()
   361вҶ’            prefetchTasks.removeValue(forKey: key)
   362вҶ’        }
   363вҶ’
   364вҶ’        // йҮӢж”ҫи¶…еҮәзҜ„еңҚзҡ„еҝ«еҸ–
   365вҶ’        cache = cache.filter { activeImageURLs.contains($0.key) }
   366вҶ’        thumbnailCache = thumbnailCache.filter { activeImageURLs.contains($0.key.url) }
   367вҶ’        pdfCache = pdfCache.filter { activePDFKeys.contains($0.key) }
   368вҶ’        pdfDocumentCache = pdfDocumentCache.filter { activePDFURLs.contains($0.key) }
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’        // е•ҹеӢ•ж–°зҡ„й җијүд»»еӢҷпјҲеҸҜиҝҪи№ӨгҖҒеҸҜеҸ–ж¶Ҳпјү
   371вҶ’        for i in range {
   372вҶ’            let item = items[i]
   373вҶ’            if let pageIndex = item.pdfPageIndex {
   374вҶ’                let key = PDFCacheKey(url: item.url, pageIndex: pageIndex)
   375вҶ’                if pdfCache[key] == nil && prefetchTasks[key] == nil {
   376вҶ’                    prefetchTasks[key] = Task {
   377вҶ’                        defer { prefetchTasks.removeValue(forKey: key) }
   378вҶ’                        guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
   379вҶ’                        _ = await loadPDFPage(url: item.url, pageIndex: pageIndex)
   380вҶ’                    }
   381вҶ’                }
   382вҶ’            } else {
   383вҶ’                if cache[item.url] == nil && imagePrefetchTasks[item.url] == nil {
   384вҶ’                    imagePrefetchTasks[item.url] = Task {
   385вҶ’                        defer { imagePrefetchTasks.removeValue(forKey: item.url) }
   386вҶ’                        guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
   387вҶ’                        _ = await loadImageCooperative(at: item.url)
   388вҶ’                    }
   389вҶ’                }
   390вҶ’            }
   391вҶ’        }
   392вҶ’    }
   393вҶ’
   394вҶ’    /// жё…з©әзё®ең–еҝ«еҸ–пјҲQuick Grid dismiss еҫҢе‘јеҸ«пјҢйҒҝе…Қ 240px е°Ҹең–ж®ҳз•ҷжұЎжҹ“дё»з•«йқў fallbackпјү
   395вҶ’    func clearThumbnailCache() {
   396вҶ’        thumbnailCache.removeAll()
   397вҶ’    }
   398вҶ’
   399вҶ’    /// еҸ–ж¶ҲжүҖжңүй җијүд»»еӢҷдёҰжё…з©әзё®ең–еҝ«еҸ–
   400вҶ’    func cancelAllPrefetchTasks() {
   401вҶ’        for (_, task) in prefetchTasks { task.cancel() }
   402вҶ’        for (_, task) in imagePrefetchTasks { task.cancel() }
   403вҶ’        prefetchTasks.removeAll()
   404вҶ’        imagePrefetchTasks.removeAll()
   405вҶ’        thumbnailCache.removeAll()
   406вҶ’    }
   407вҶ’
   408вҶ’    /// жё…з©әдё»ең–зүҮеҝ«еҸ–гҖҒPDF еҝ«еҸ–еҸҠеҸ–ж¶ҲжүҖжңүй җијүд»»еӢҷпјҲиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣжҷӮе‘јеҸ«пјү
   409вҶ’    func clearImageCache() {
   410вҶ’        cache.removeAll()
   411вҶ’        pdfCache.removeAll()
   412вҶ’        pdfDocumentCache.removeAll()
   413вҶ’        for (_, task) in prefetchTasks { task.cancel() }
   414вҶ’        prefetchTasks.removeAll()
   415вҶ’        for (_, task) in imagePrefetchTasks { task.cancel() }
   416вҶ’        imagePrefetchTasks.removeAll()
   417вҶ’    }
   418вҶ’
   419вҶ’    // MARK: - Test-Only Accessors
   420вҶ’
   421вҶ’    func _testImageCacheCount() -> Int { cache.count }
   422вҶ’}

   108вҶ’    private var lastNotifiedIndex: Int = -1

   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’    /// й…ҚзҪ®иҰ–ең–
   113вҶ’    func configure(with folder: ImageFolder, imageLoader: ImageLoader) {
   114вҶ’        self.folder = folder
   115вҶ’        self.imageLoader = imageLoader
   116вҶ’        self.lastNotifiedIndex = -1
   117вҶ’        self.configurationID = UUID()  // ж–°зҡ„ configuration generation
   118вҶ’
   119вҶ’        // йҮҚзҪ®жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘
   120вҶ’        resetScrollDirection()
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’        // жё…зҗҶиҲҠзҡ„ slotsпјҲе…ҲеҸ–ж¶Ҳијүе…Ҙд»»еӢҷеҶҚз§»йҷӨпјү
   123вҶ’        for slot in activeSlots {
   124вҶ’            slot.prepareForReuse()
   125вҶ’            slot.removeFromSuperview()
   126вҶ’        }
   127вҶ’        activeSlots.removeAll()
   128вҶ’        reusableSlots.removeAll()
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’        // иЁӯе®ҡиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣзӣЈжҺ§пјҲidempotent вҖ” MemoryPressureMonitor е…§йғЁжңү guardпјү
   131вҶ’        setupMemoryPressureMonitor()
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’        NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] configure: folder.images.count=\(folder.images.count), containerWidth=\(containerWidth)")
   134вҶ’
   135вҶ’        // еңЁ Task еӨ–йғЁжҚ•зҚІжүҖжңүйңҖиҰҒзҡ„еҖјпјҢйҒҝе…ҚиіҮж–ҷз«¶зҲӯ
   136вҶ’        let capturedFolder = folder
   137вҶ’        let capturedLoader: ImageLoader? = imageLoader
   138вҶ’        let capturedConfigurationID = configurationID
   139вҶ’        let capturedDefaultRatio = defaultAspectRatio
   140вҶ’
   141вҶ’        Task { [weak self] in
   142вҶ’            guard let loader = capturedLoader else { return }
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’            // дҪҝз”Ё TaskGroup е№іиЎҢијүе…Ҙ
   145вҶ’            let sizes = await withTaskGroup(of: (Int, NSSize).self) { group in
   146вҶ’                for (index, item) in capturedFolder.images.enumerated() {
   147вҶ’                    group.addTask {
   148вҶ’                        if let size = await loader.getImageSize(for: item.url) {
   149вҶ’                            return (index, size)
   150вҶ’                        } else {
   151вҶ’                            // з„Ўжі•еҸ–еҫ—е°әеҜёжҷӮдҪҝз”Ёй җиЁӯжҜ”дҫӢ
   152вҶ’                            return (index, NSSize(width: Constants.defaultWindowWidth, height: Constants.defaultWindowWidth / capturedDefaultRatio))
   153вҶ’                        }
   154вҶ’                    }
   155вҶ’                }
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’                var results: [(Int, NSSize)] = []
   158вҶ’                for await result in group {
   159вҶ’                    results.append(result)
   160вҶ’                }
   161вҶ’                return results.sorted { $0.0 < $1.0 }.map { $0.1 }
   162вҶ’            }
   163вҶ’
   164вҶ’            await MainActor.run { [weak self] in
   165вҶ’                // Stale write йҳІиӯ·пјҡзўәиӘҚ configurationID д»Қз„¶еҢ№й…Қ
   166вҶ’                guard self?.configurationID == capturedConfigurationID else { return }
   167вҶ’                self?.imageSizes = sizes
   168вҶ’                NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] preloaded \(sizes.count) image sizes")
   169вҶ’                self?.recalculateLayout()
   170вҶ’                // йҖҡзҹҘй җијүе®ҢжҲҗ
   171вҶ’                self?.onPreloadComplete?()
   172вҶ’            }
   173вҶ’        }
   174вҶ’    }
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’    /// йҮҚзҪ®жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘пјҲз”Ёж–ј folder еҲҮжҸӣжҷӮпјү
   177вҶ’    private func resetScrollDirection() {
   178вҶ’        lastScrollY = nil
   179вҶ’        isScrollingDown = true
   180вҶ’    }
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’    /// йҮҚж–°иЁҲз®—дҪҲеұҖпјҲдҪҝз”ЁжЁҷжә–еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҡy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјү
   183вҶ’    private func recalculateLayout() {
   184вҶ’        guard !imageSizes.isEmpty else {
   185вҶ’            scaledHeights = []
   186вҶ’            yOffsets = []
   187вҶ’            frame = NSRect(x: 0, y: 0, width: containerWidth, height: 0)
   188вҶ’            NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] recalculateLayout: empty imageSizes")
   189вҶ’            return
   190вҶ’        }
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’        // Cache зё®ж”ҫеҫҢзҡ„й«ҳеәҰпјҢйҒҝе…ҚйҮҚиӨҮиЁҲз®—
   193вҶ’        scaledHeights = imageSizes.map { scaledHeightForSize($0) }
   194вҶ’        let totalHeight = scaledHeights.reduce(0, +) + CGFloat(max(0, scaledHeights.count - 1)) * imageSpacing
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’        // еҫһй Ӯз«Ҝй–Ӣе§ӢеҫҖдёӢжҺ’еҲ— (unflipped: еӨ§ y еңЁдёҠпјҢе°Ҹ y еңЁдёӢ)
   197вҶ’        var offsets: [CGFloat] = []
   198вҶ’        var currentY = totalHeight
   199вҶ’        for h in scaledHeights {
   200вҶ’            let bottomY = currentY - h
   201вҶ’            offsets.append(bottomY)
   202вҶ’            currentY = bottomY - imageSpacing
   203вҶ’        }
   204вҶ’
   205вҶ’        self.yOffsets = offsets
   206вҶ’        frame = NSRect(x: 0, y: 0, width: containerWidth, height: totalHeight)
   207вҶ’
   208вҶ’        NSLog("[ContinuousScroll] recalculateLayout: totalHeight=\(totalHeight), containerWidth=\(containerWidth), frame=\(frame)")
   209вҶ’
   210вҶ’        needsDisplay = true
   211вҶ’    }
   212вҶ’
   213вҶ’    /// иЁҲз®— fit-to-width зё®ж”ҫеҫҢзҡ„й«ҳеәҰпјҲйҳІжӯўйҷӨд»Ҙйӣ¶пјү
   214вҶ’    private func scaledHeightForSize(_ size: NSSize) -> CGFloat {
   215вҶ’        guard size.width > 0 else {
   216вҶ’            return containerWidth / defaultAspectRatio
   217вҶ’        }
   218вҶ’        return (size.height / size.width) * containerWidth
   219вҶ’    }
   220вҶ’
   221вҶ’    // MARK: - View Recycling
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’    /// жӣҙж–°еҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚе…§зҡ„ slotsпјҲе°ҚеӨ–е…ҘеҸЈпјү
   224вҶ’    func updateVisibleSlots(for visibleBounds: NSRect) {
   225вҶ’        // Cache visible boundsпјҲиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еЈ“еҠӣиҷ•зҗҶжҷӮдҪҝз”Ёпјү
   226вҶ’        lastKnownVisibleBounds = visibleBounds
   227вҶ’
   228вҶ’        // жҒўеҫ© buffer countпјҲwarning еЈ“еҠӣеҫҢпјҢдёӢж¬Ў scroll жҒўеҫ©пјү
   229вҶ’        if needsBufferRestoration {
   230вҶ’            bufferCount = defaultBufferCount
   231вҶ’            needsBufferRestoration = false
   232вҶ’        }
   233вҶ’
   234вҶ’        // жӣҙж–°жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘
   235вҶ’        updateScrollDirection(currentY: visibleBounds.midY)
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’        // еҺҹжңүзҡ„ index tracking
   238вҶ’        let newIndex = calculateCurrentIndex(for: visibleBounds.midY)
   239вҶ’        if newIndex != lastNotifiedIndex {
   240вҶ’            lastNotifiedIndex = newIndex
   241вҶ’            notifyImageChanged(index: newIndex)
   242вҶ’        }
   243вҶ’
   244вҶ’        // View recycling
   245вҶ’        let visibleRange = manageSlotViews(for: visibleBounds)
   246вҶ’
   247вҶ’        // и§ёзҷјй җеҸ–
   248вҶ’        triggerPrefetch(visibleRange: visibleRange)
   249вҶ’    }
   250вҶ’
   251вҶ’    /// жӣҙж–°жҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘
   252вҶ’    /// - Parameter currentY: з•¶еүҚжҚІеӢ•дҪҚзҪ®пјҲжЁҷжә–еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҢy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјү
   253вҶ’    func updateScrollDirection(currentY: CGFloat) {
   254вҶ’        if let lastY = lastScrollY {
   255вҶ’            // жЁҷжә–еә§жЁҷзі»зөұпјҲy=0 еңЁеә•йғЁпјүпјҡе°Ҹ y = иҰ–иҰәдёӢж–№ = index еўһеҠ 
   256вҶ’            isScrollingDown = currentY < lastY
   257вҶ’        }
   258вҶ’        lastScrollY = currentY
   259вҶ’    }
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’    /// иЁҲз®—еҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚпјҲеҗ« bufferпјүвҖ” O(log n) binary search
   262вҶ’    /// yOffsets жҳҜйҒһжёӣжҺ’еҲ—пјҡindex 0 = жңҖдёҠж–№пјҲжңҖеӨ§ yпјүпјҢindex N-1 = жңҖеә•йғЁпјҲжңҖе°Ҹ yпјү
   263вҶ’    func calculateVisibleRange(for visibleRect: NSRect) -> ClosedRange<Int> {
   264вҶ’        guard !imageSizes.isEmpty else { return 0...0 }
   265вҶ’
   266вҶ’        let count = imageSizes.count
   267вҶ’
   268вҶ’        // з”Ё calculateCurrentIndex (binary search) жүҫеҲ°еҢ…еҗ« visibleRect йӮҠз•Ңзҡ„ең–зүҮ
   269вҶ’        let firstVisible = calculateCurrentIndex(for: visibleRect.maxY)   // й Ӯз«Ҝ вҶ’ жңҖдёҠж–№зҡ„еҸҜиҰӢең–зүҮ
   270вҶ’        let lastVisible = calculateCurrentIndex(for: visibleRect.minY)    // еә•з«Ҝ вҶ’ жңҖеә•йғЁзҡ„еҸҜиҰӢең–зүҮ
   271вҶ’
   272вҶ’        // еҠ дёҠ buffer
   273вҶ’        let bufferedFirst = max(0, firstVisible - bufferCount)
   274вҶ’        let bufferedLast = min(count - 1, lastVisible + bufferCount)
   275вҶ’
   276вҶ’        return bufferedFirst...bufferedLast
   277вҶ’    }
   278вҶ’
   279вҶ’    /// Dequeue жҲ–е»әз«Ӣж–°зҡ„ slot
   280вҶ’    private func dequeueOrCreateSlot() -> ImageSlotView {
   281вҶ’        if let reusable = reusableSlots.popLast() {
   282вҶ’            return reusable
   283вҶ’        }
   284вҶ’        return ImageSlotView(frame: .zero)
   285вҶ’    }
   286вҶ’
   287вҶ’    /// жӘўжҹҘжҢҮе®ҡ index зҡ„ slot жҳҜеҗҰе·ІеӯҳеңЁ
   288вҶ’    private func isSlotActive(for index: Int) -> Bool {
   289вҶ’        activeSlots.contains { $0.imageIndex == index }
   290вҶ’    }
   291вҶ’
   292вҶ’    /// з®ЎзҗҶеҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚе…§зҡ„ slot viewsпјҲview recycling ж ёеҝғж–№жі•пјү
   293вҶ’    /// - Returns: еҸҜиҰӢзҜ„еңҚпјҲеҗ« bufferпјү
   294вҶ’    @discardableResult
   295вҶ’    private func manageSlotViews(for visibleRect: NSRect) -> ClosedRange<Int> {
   296вҶ’        let visibleRange = calculateVisibleRange(for: visibleRect)
   297вҶ’
   298вҶ’        // 1. еӣһж”¶и¶…еҮәзҜ„еңҚзҡ„ slotsпјҲzoom дёӯи·ійҒҺеӣһж”¶пјҢйҳІжӯўй»‘иүІй–ғзҲҚпјү
   299вҶ’        if !isZooming {
   300вҶ’            for slot in activeSlots where !visibleRange.contains(slot.imageIndex) {
   301вҶ’                slot.removeFromSuperview()
   302вҶ’                slot.prepareForReuse()
   303вҶ’                reusableSlots.append(slot)
   304вҶ’            }
   305вҶ’            activeSlots.removeAll { !visibleRange.contains($0.imageIndex) }
   306вҶ’        }
   307вҶ’
   308вҶ’        // 2. зӮәж–°йҖІе…ҘзҜ„еңҚзҡ„ indices е»әз«Ӣ slots
   309вҶ’        for index in visibleRange where !isSlotActive(for: index) {
   310вҶ’            let slot = dequeueOrCreateSlot()
   311вҶ’            slot.imageIndex = index
   312вҶ’            slot.frame = frameForImage(at: index)
   313вҶ’            slot.setScalingFilters(magnification: currentMagFilter, minification: currentMinFilter)
   314вҶ’            addSubview(slot)
   315вҶ’            activeSlots.append(slot)
   316вҶ’            loadImage(for: index, into: slot)
   317вҶ’        }
   318вҶ’
   319вҶ’        return visibleRange
   320вҶ’    }
   321вҶ’
   322вҶ’    /// иЁҲз®—жҢҮе®ҡ index ең–зүҮзҡ„ frame
   323вҶ’    func frameForImage(at index: Int) -> NSRect {
   324вҶ’        guard index < imageSizes.count && index < yOffsets.count else {
   325вҶ’            return .zero
   326вҶ’        }
   327вҶ’        let height = scaledHeights[safe: index] ?? containerWidth / defaultAspectRatio
   328вҶ’        let y = yOffsets[index]
   329вҶ’        return NSRect(x: 0, y: y, width: containerWidth, height: height)
   330вҶ’    }
   331вҶ’
   332вҶ’    // MARK: - Async Image Loading
   333вҶ’
   334вҶ’    private func loadImage(for index: Int, into slot: ImageSlotView) {
   335вҶ’        guard let folder = folder,
   336вҶ’              index < folder.images.count,
   337вҶ’              let loader = imageLoader else { return }
   338вҶ’
   339вҶ’        let item = folder.images[index]
   340вҶ’
   341вҶ’        // еҸ–ж¶Ҳи©І slot еҺҹжңүзҡ„ијүе…Ҙд»»еӢҷ
   342вҶ’        slot.prepareForReuse()
   343вҶ’        slot.imageIndex = index
   344вҶ’
   345вҶ’        // е»әз«Ӣж–°зҡ„ијүе…Ҙд»»еӢҷ
   346вҶ’        let task = Task { [weak self] in
   347вҶ’            guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
   348вҶ’
   349вҶ’            let image: NSImage?
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’            // ж №ж“ҡйЎһеһӢйҒёж“Үијүе…Ҙж–№ејҸ
   352вҶ’            if let pageIndex = item.pdfPageIndex {
   353вҶ’                image = await loader.loadPDFPage(url: item.url, pageIndex: pageIndex)
   354вҶ’            } else {
   355вҶ’                image = await loader.loadImage(at: item.url)
   356вҶ’            }
   357вҶ’
   358вҶ’            guard let image else { return }
   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’            await MainActor.run { [weak self] in
   361вҶ’                // жӘўжҹҘ self е’Ң folder жҳҜеҗҰд»ҚеӯҳеңЁ
   362вҶ’                guard let self,
   363вҶ’                      self.folder != nil else { return }
   364вҶ’                // Stale write йҳІиӯ·пјҡзўәиӘҚ slot д»Қе°ҚжҮүйҖҷеҖӢ index
   365вҶ’                guard slot.imageIndex == index else { return }
   366вҶ’                slot.setImage(image)
   367вҶ’            }
   368вҶ’        }
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’        slot.setLoadTask(task)
   371вҶ’    }
   372вҶ’
   373вҶ’    // MARK: - Prefetch (Phase 3.2)
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’    /// и§ёзҷјй җеҸ–пјҲж №ж“ҡжҚІеӢ•ж–№еҗ‘пјү
   376вҶ’    private func triggerPrefetch(visibleRange: ClosedRange<Int>) {
   377вҶ’        // зҜҖжөҒжӘўжҹҘпјҲ20Hzпјү
   378вҶ’        guard prefetchThrottle.shouldProceed() else { return }
   379вҶ’
   380вҶ’        guard let folder = folder,
   381вҶ’              let loader = imageLoader else { return }
   382вҶ’
   383вҶ’        // иЁҲз®—й җеҸ–зҜ„еңҚ
   384вҶ’        let prefetchCount = 5
   385вҶ’        let prefetchStart: Int
   386вҶ’        let prefetchEnd: Int
   387вҶ’
   388вҶ’        if isScrollingDown {
   389вҶ’            prefetchStart = visibleRange.upperBound + 1
   390вҶ’            prefetchEnd = min(folder.images.count - 1, visibleRange.upperBound + prefetchCount)
   391вҶ’        } else {
   392вҶ’            prefetchStart = max(0, visibleRange.lowerBound - prefetchCount)
   393вҶ’            prefetchEnd = visibleRange.lowerBound - 1
   394вҶ’        }
   395вҶ’
   396вҶ’        guard prefetchStart <= prefetchEnd else { return }
   397вҶ’
   398вҶ’        // и§ёзҷј ImageLoader й җеҸ–
   399вҶ’        let direction: PrefetchDirection = isScrollingDown ? .forward : .backward
   400вҶ’        Task {
   401вҶ’            await loader.updateCache(
   402вҶ’                currentIndex: visibleRange.lowerBound,
   403вҶ’                items: folder.images,
   404вҶ’                prefetchDirection: direction
   405вҶ’            )
   406вҶ’        }
   407вҶ’    }
   408вҶ’
   409вҶ’    // MARK: - Index Tracking
   410вҶ’
   411вҶ’    /// йҖҡзҹҘең–зүҮи®Ҡжӣҙ
   412вҶ’    private func notifyImageChanged(index: Int) {
   413вҶ’        guard scaledHeights.indices.contains(index) else { return }
   414вҶ’
   415вҶ’        let scaledHeight = scaledHeights[index]
   416вҶ’        let scaledSize = NSSize(width: containerWidth, height: scaledHeight)
   417вҶ’
   418вҶ’        onCurrentImageChanged?(index, scaledSize)
   419вҶ’    }
